description: 3DSTarPred performs shape/pharmacophore similarity screening on small molecules and searches ChEMBL29 or PDB for potential targets.

fields.label: SDF File
fields.description: Upload the small-molecule structure in SDF format.

fields.label: Reference Database
fields.description: Choose the target reference database: pdb uses PDB, chembl29 uses ChEMBL29.

fields.label: Query Conformations
fields.description: Number of conformers generated for each molecule.

fields.label: Ranking
fields.description: Sorting method: similarity (by similarity score) or overall (similarity × activity).

outputHints: Downloaded results include predicted_target.csv (target summary), detail.csv (similarity details), and overlay SDF files.
The UI previews the first 200 rows from predicted_target.csv, showing mol_id, pref_name, similarity, overall, etc.
